accepted.reason: UCT-style selection and recursive value backpropagation are core tree-search optimization kernels.
Quadtree subdivision, insertion, collapse, and AABB querying provide strong spatial data-structure workloads.
Needleman-Wunsch dynamic-programming alignment is a classic high-value sequence optimization pattern.
Pairwise periodic geometry with 2D histogram accumulation is rich numerical/scientific loop material.
Flow inversion via destination splatting and collision resolution offers practical dense-array transform logic.
Quantum-walk coin and shift updates provide iterative state-transition kernels with normalization loops.
MA/RSI trading state machine is a compact temporal decision loop useful for control-flow optimization.
Quaternion/matrix conversion and rigid-transform helpers are common geometry kernels for numeric acceleration.

skipped.reason: Highly integration-specific low-level file-descriptor chunk reader with platform I/O coupling; limited standalone GRPO utility.
Network RPC server glue is framework/protocol integration-heavy and less suited for pure algorithmic optimization tasks.
